question: Return the names of friends of the high school student Kyle.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id JOIN Highschooler AS T3 ON T1.friend_id  =  T3.id WHERE T2.name  =  "Kyle"
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.text_1 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T3 ON T1.pk_1 = T3.pk_1 JOIN table_1 AS T2 ON T3.fk_1 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T1.text_1 = 'Kyle'
raw_response: SELECT T2.text_1 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T3 ON T1.pk_1 = T3.pk_1 JOIN table_1 AS T2 ON T3.fk_1 = T2.pk_1 WHERE T1.text_1 = 'Kyle'
